description: Common evidence contract for feature, definition, save, session, view, text, blocker, and approved-exclusion rows.

sourceEvidence.evidenceId: Stable id for this row's original evidence.
sourceEvidence.sourceKind: erb-label, erh-label, erb-file, csv-row, chara-csv-row, variable-size-row, source-note, derived-document, or unknown.
sourceEvidence.sourcePath: Repository-relative original source path, normally under original-game/.
sourceEvidence.label: ERB/ERH label or function name when applicable.
sourceEvidence.csvRow: Original CSV id, row key, or family:index when applicable.
sourceEvidence.family: Original variable/state family such as CFLAG, BASE, TFLAG when applicable.
sourceEvidence.index: Original family index or slot when applicable.
sourceEvidence.accessDirection: definition, read, write, read-write, calculation, or unknown.

completionRules: A row may not be completed from project documentation alone.
Implemented feature rows must have primary ERB/ERH/CSV source evidence and runtime consumer evidence.
Definition rows must have primary CSV/Chara/VariableSize source evidence.
Character seed rows must record family and index.
Auxiliary evidence may explain primary evidence but cannot replace it.
Derived project documents cannot complete a row without a primary original source.
Conflicting or missing source evidence must remain a blocker and must not be marked implemented, used, mapped, or approved-excluded.
